name: Floral Wrap Midi Dress
description: A breezy wrap-style midi dress featuring an all-over floral print. Adjustable tie waist, V-neckline, and flutter sleeves make it perfect for brunches and casual outings.

name: Linen Slip Dress
description: Minimalist linen-blend slip dress with adjustable spaghetti straps and a relaxed A-line silhouette. Lightweight and breathable for warm days.

name: Bodycon Bandage Dress
description: Form-fitting ribbed bandage dress with a square neckline and ruched side detail. A go-to for evening events and parties.

name: Tiered Boho Maxi Dress
description: Flowy tiered maxi dress in a relaxed bohemian style. Features elastic smocked bodice, puff sleeves, and a hem with lace trim.

name: Shirt Dress with Belt
description: Classic shirt dress crafted from crisp cotton. Button-down front, chest pockets, and a matching waist belt give it a structured yet relaxed look.

name: Cut-Out Bodycon Mini
description: Stretchy knit mini dress with tasteful cut-outs at the waist. Scoop neckline and thick straps for comfortable wear at clubs and late-night events.

name: Smocked Sundress
description: Lightweight sundress with a fully smocked bodice, ruffled hem, and adjustable straps. Pairs beautifully with sandals and a straw hat.

name: Off-Shoulder Ruffle Dress
description: Romantic off-shoulder dress with a cascading ruffle along the neckline and a midi-length layered skirt. Great for festivals and beach weddings.

name: Blazer Dress
description: Structured blazer-style mini dress with double-breasted gold buttons and lapel collar. Ideal for business casual and smart-formal occasions.

name: Denim Shirt Dress
description: Casual denim shirt dress with a relaxed fit, button-through front, and frayed hem. Wear it open over leggings or cinched at the waist.

name: Satin Slip Party Dress
description: Luxe satin midi slip dress with a bias cut and adjustable thin straps. Effortlessly transitions from day to evening with the right accessories.

name: Puff Sleeve Mini Dress
description: Playful mini dress with exaggerated puff sleeves and a square neckline. Elasticated cuffs and relaxed flare skirt keep it comfortable and cute.

name: Asymmetric Hem Dress
description: Contemporary dress with a high-low asymmetric hemline and a sleeveless silhouette. Features a mock neck and a back zip closure.

name: Polo Knit Dress
description: Sporty-chic polo dress in soft knit fabric with a button-front placket, collar, and rolled short sleeves. Great for athleisure and country club aesthetics.

name: Zimmermann-Inspired Lace Dress
description: Delicate lace midi dress with a fitted waist, scalloped hem, and spaghetti straps. Semi-sheer overlay adds romantic elegance.

name: Oversized Graphic Tee
description: 100% cotton boxy graphic tee with vintage-inspired print. Dropped shoulders and a relaxed fit make it an effortless everyday wardrobe staple.

name: Cropped Linen Shirt
description: Lightweight cropped linen shirt with a relaxed collar, roll-up sleeves, and a front button closure. Knot it at the hem or tuck it in.

name: Ribbed Crop Cami
description: Snug ribbed knit cami with adjustable straps and a scoop neckline. Layer it under blazers or wear solo with high-waisted jeans.

name: Bardot Off-Shoulder Top
description: Flirty Bardot-style top with elasticated off-shoulder neckline and a ruffled trim. Made from soft crepe fabric.

name: Peplum Blouse
description: Fitted peplum blouse with subtle flare at the hem. Concealed back zipper, cinched waist, and a V-neckline for a polished silhouette.

name: Sheer Organza Blouse
description: Ethereal sheer organza top with a high neck and long sleeves. Delicate button detailing at back. Perfect over a bralette for fashion-forward looks.

name: Bralette with Underwire
description: Supportive bralette crafted from soft microfibre with underwire support and adjustable straps. Dual-purpose top and inner wear.

name: Knotted Tie-Front Top
description: Breezy woven top with a front knot and flutter sleeves. Relaxed neckline and an easy pull-on style ideal for vacations and weekend wear.

name: Sequin Party Top
description: All-over sequin embellished camisole top with scoop neck and a cropped length. The life of the party paired with tailored trousers.

name: Striped Boatneck Top
description: Classic French Riviera-inspired striped top with a wide boatneck and three-quarter length sleeves. Soft cotton-modal blend.

name: Corset Boning Top
description: Structured satin corset top with boning, sweetheart neckline, and adjustable lace-up back. Instantly elevates any look.

name: Flowy Chiffon Blouse
description: Draped chiffon blouse with a loose silhouette and tie at the neckline. A versatile office-to-evening wardrobe staple.

name: Muscle Tee
description: Effortlessly casual muscle tee with deep armholes and a slightly cropped length. Made from soft jersey fabric.

name: Wrap Blouse
description: V-neck wrap blouse with adjustable waist ties and long sleeves with a subtle flare at the cuff. Polished enough for the office.

name: Ruched Satin Cami
description: Satin camisole with central ruching and adjustable straps. Versatile enough to be worn tucked into trousers or layered under a blazer.

name: High-Waist Straight Leg Jeans
description: Classic high-rise straight-leg jeans in rigid denim. Five-pocket styling, raw hem, and a zip-fly closure. A wardrobe essential.

name: Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Flowy wide-leg trousers in a smooth crepe fabric. High-rise waist, side pockets, and a hook-and-eye closure. Effortlessly sophisticated.

name: Mini Pleated Skirt
description: Y2K-inspired mini pleated skirt with a wide waistband and button-tab front. Pairs well with fitted crop tops and platform sneakers.

name: Flare Yoga Pants
description: High-waist flare yoga pants in buttery-soft 4-way stretch fabric. Flat waistband with no-roll technology and hidden waistband pocket.

name: Midi Wrap Skirt
description: Versatile wrap skirt in lightweight crepe. Adjustable tie waist, midi length, and a slight slit at the hem. Easy to style up or down.

name: Cigarette Trousers
description: Slim cigarette-cut trousers with a high waist, clean front, and a cropped ankle length. A polished office staple in structured fabric.

name: Cargo Pants
description: Relaxed-fit cargo pants with multiple side pockets, elasticised ankle cuffs, and a drawstring waist. The ultimate street-style staple.

name: Leather Mini Skirt
description: Faux leather A-line mini skirt with a back-zip closure and a subtle flare. An edgy, fashion-forward piece for nights out.

name: Jogger Pants
description: Cosy French terry jogger pants with a tapered fit, elasticized waistband, and ribbed ankle cuffs. Perfect for lounging and errands.

name: Broderie Anglaise Skirt
description: Floaty midi skirt in white broderie anglaise cotton with a scalloped hem and elasticised waist. Ideal for summer and beach holidays.

name: Slit Maxi Skirt
description: Elegant maxi skirt with a floor-length silhouette, high front slit, and elasticated waistband. Satin-finish fabric gives a luxe look.

name: Mom Jeans
description: Relaxed high-rise mom jeans with a tapered leg and light wash finish. Features a five-pocket design and a zip-button closure.

name: Linen Shorts
description: Relaxed linen shorts with a wide waistband, front pleat, and side pockets. Breathable and stylish for hot days.

name: Bike Shorts
description: High-waist compression bike shorts with flatlock seams for chafe-free wear. Suitable for gym, cycling, and casual street styling.

name: Palazzo Pants
description: Fluid palazzo pants with an extra-wide leg, elasticated waist, and lightweight georgette fabric. Comfortable, airy, and deeply elegant.

name: Floral Co-ord Set — Top
description: Part of PRD-046/PRD-047 floral co-ord set. Top features a halter neck, smocked back, and a cropped length. Bright botanical print on lightweight cotton.

description: Part of PRD-064/PRD-065 boho co-ord. Flared wide-leg pants in matching paisley print viscose with elasticated waist.

description: Part of PRD-072/PRD-073 knit tank co-ord. Fitted ribbed knit tank top with a square neckline.

description: Part of PRD-072/PRD-073 knit tank co-ord. Matching fitted ribbed mini skirt with side slit and elasticated waist.

description: Part of PRD-074/PRD-075. Matching pastel high-waist bike shorts in scuba fabric with flatlock seams.

name: Straight-Cut Kurta
description: Lightweight straight-cut kurta in soft cotton with subtle block print at the hem and cuffs. Suitable for casual, office, and everyday wear.

name: A-Line Embroidered Kurta
description: Flared A-line kurta with intricate thread embroidery at the neckline and border. Made from fine chanderi fabric.

name: Angrakha Style Kurta
description: Traditional Angrakha wrap-style kurta with asymmetric overlap, side ties, and 3/4 sleeves in rich jewel-tone georgette.

name: Printed Kurti Top
description: Short kurti top in vibrant digital print on rayon. V-neckline, 3/4 sleeves, and a straight hem — easy to pair with jeans or palazzos.

name: Silk Kurta with Zari Border
description: Luxe pure silk kurta with a golden zari woven border. Straight-cut with a round neckline and three-quarter sleeves. Ideal for festivals.

name: Salwar Kameez Set
description: Classic salwar kameez in cotton with a printed kameez, straight salwar, and matching dupatta. Comfortable and elegant for daily wear.

name: Palazzo Salwar Set
description: Elegant palazzo salwar set with a long flared kurta and wide-leg palazzo pants in georgette with minimal embroidery.

name: Pant Salwar Set
description: Contemporary pant-style salwar set with a long A-line kurta and slim tapered trousers. Chanderi top with printed hem.

name: Designer Sharara Set
description: Stunning sharara set with a cropped kurta top and heavily flared sharara pants with zari embroidery. Perfect for weddings and functions.

name: Cotton Block Print Dupatta
description: Hand block-printed cotton dupatta with tassel fringe ends. A versatile accessory to complement any ethnic ensemble.

name: Embroidered Silk Dupatta
description: Luxurious silk dupatta with intricate phulkari embroidery and a scalloped border. Makes a statement on any ethnic outfit.

name: Bandhani Dupatta
description: Beautiful hand-tied bandhani dupatta in vibrant colours with gold border. Lightweight chiffon fabric.

name: Bridal Lehenga Set
description: Opulent bridal lehenga with heavy zardozi embroidered choli, flared skirt with 6m sweep, and matching dupatta.

name: Party Lehenga Set
description: Festive lehenga with a sequin-embellished blouse, semi-stitched flared skirt, and organza dupatta for sangeet and parties.

name: Indo-Western Lehenga
description: Contemporary Indo-Western lehenga with a crop jacket blouse, A-line skirt with minimal embroidery, and no dupatta.

name: Classic Oxford Shirt
description: Timeless Oxford button-down shirt in 100% cotton with a chest pocket and single-button cuffs. Ideal for smart casual and business casual.

name: Linen Resort Shirt
description: Relaxed linen shirt with a camp collar and short sleeves. Breathable and lightweight, perfect for vacations and summer weekends.

name: Printed Casual Shirt
description: Fun printed casual shirt with all-over tropical or abstract print. Relaxed fit, camp collar, and a straight hem.

name: Formal Dress Shirt
description: Slim-fit formal dress shirt with a spread collar, French cuffs, and a hidden button placket. Perfect with suits and ties.

name: Flannel Check Shirt
description: Warm brushed flannel shirt in classic windowpane check. Relaxed fit with a button-down collar and chest pockets.

name: Slim Fit Chinos
description: Clean-lined slim-fit chinos in stretch cotton twill. Mid-rise waist, on-seam pockets, and a tapered leg.

name: Regular Fit Formal Trousers
description: Classic regular-fit formal trousers in structured fabric with a flat front and pressed crease. Essential for business wear.

name: Relaxed Linen Trousers
description: Easy-fitting linen trousers with a drawstring waist and side pockets. Lightweight and breathable for warm weather.

name: Men's Cargo Trousers
description: Rugged cargo trousers with multiple utility pockets, a relaxed fit, and a drawstring waist.

name: Men's Slim Fit Jeans

name: Formal Suit Trousers
description: Part of PRD-101/PRD-102. Matching slim-fit flat-front suit trousers with pressed crease and side tabs.

name: Linen Suit Blazer

name: Linen Suit Trousers
description: Part of PRD-103/PRD-104. Relaxed straight-cut linen trousers with elasticated waist and patch pockets.

name: Check Blazer

name: Men's Polo T-Shirt
description: Piqué cotton polo with a ribbed collar, two-button placket, and a side-vent hem.

name: Graphic Oversized Tee — Men

name: Striped Cotton T-Shirt — Men
description: Classic crew-neck striped tee in a soft cotton-modal blend. Slim fit with a comfortable stretch.

name: Henley T-Shirt
description: Long-sleeve Henley tee with a three-button placket and a relaxed fit in soft heavyweight jersey.

name: Men's Slim Kurta

name: Nehru Jacket

name: Sherwani Set
description: Premium sherwani set with embroidery on the kurta, matching churidar, and stole. For grooms and wedding functions.

name: Men's Performance Jogger

name: Men's Training Shorts

name: Men's Zip Hoodie
description: Heavyweight French terry full-zip hoodie with a kangaroo pocket and ribbed waistband.

name: Men's Crewneck Sweatshirt
description: Classic crewneck sweatshirt in brushed fleece with ribbed cuffs and hem.

name: Men's Cable Knit Sweater
description: Cable-knit wool-blend crew neck sweater with rollneck. Warm and textured, essential for winter dressing.

name: Men's Bomber Jacket
description: Classic bomber jacket in a smooth satin shell with rib-knit collar, cuffs, and hem. Lightweight and versatile.

name: Men's Denim Jacket

name: Men's Kurta Pyjama Set
description: Easy kurta-pyjama set in breathable cotton. Straight-cut long kurta with matching straight-leg pyjama.

name: Men's Swim Shorts
description: Quick-dry swim shorts with an elastic waistband, drawstring, side pockets, and a mesh lining.

name: Men's Puffer Jacket
description: Lightweight packable puffer jacket with down-fill insulation, stand collar, and two-way zip. Packs into its own pocket.

name: Men's Vintage Wash Tee
description: Soft garment-dyed relaxed-fit tee with a washed-out vintage feel. Crew neck with slightly longer back hem.

name: Men's Straight Fit Chinos
description: Relaxed straight-fit chinos in durable cotton blend. Versatile for weekdays and weekends with on-seam pockets.

name: Men's Formal Waistcoat
description: Classic five-button formal waistcoat with welt pockets and an adjustable back strap.

name: Men's Mandarin Collar Shirt
description: Minimalist mandarin collar shirt in premium cotton poplin. A modern alternative to traditional dress shirts.

name: Men's Tracksuit Top

name: Men's Tracksuit Bottoms
description: Part of PRD-127/PRD-128. Tapered track pants in matching moisture-wicking fabric with zip pockets and drawstring waist.

name: Men's Silk Blend Kurta
description: Elegant silk-blend kurta with subtle texture and a V-neck with piping. Wear with churidar for festive occasions.

name: Men's Casual Linen Shorts
description: Relaxed linen shorts with a pull-on elasticated waist and two side pockets. Ideal for beach days and weekend outings.

name: Men's Reversible Jacket
description: Versatile reversible jacket — solid on one side, printed on the other. Lightweight nylon shell with a relaxed fit.

name: Day Wedding Sherwani
description: Light cotton-silk blend sherwani perfect for day wedding functions. Minimal resham embroidery, bandhgala collar.

name: Men's Long Sleeve Linen Shirt
description: Easy long-sleeve linen shirt with spread collar and button-through front. Great for layering or wearing open over a tee.

name: Men's Flannel Overshirt
description: Heavyweight flannel overshirt worn as a jacket. Relaxed fit, chest and hip pockets, and button front.

name: Cotton Vest Undershirt 2-Pack
description: Pack of 2 pure cotton round-neck vests in fine ribbed fabric for stretch and breathability.

name: Men's Barrel Fit Jeans
description: Barrel-fit relaxed jeans with high-rise, wide thigh, and slightly tapered ankle — a contemporary 90s silhouette.

name: Men's Merino Turtleneck
description: Soft merino wool turtleneck with a slim fit and extra-fine gauge. Lightweight enough to layer under a blazer.

name: Men's Patterned Socks 3-Pack
description: Set of 3 pairs of combed cotton socks in assorted playful patterns — stripes, polka dots, and geometric.

name: Men's Leather Belt
description: Full-grain leather dress belt with a polished silver or gold pin buckle. Width: 35mm. Fits waist 28–42 inches.

name: Men's Silk Pocket Square
description: Silk pocket square in a handmade print, 30×30cm. Adds colour and texture to any suit or blazer.

name: Men's Formal Silk Tie
description: Pure silk formal tie in a classic width and woven pattern. Interlined for structure and a perfect dimple.

name: Men's Sneaker Loafer
description: Slip-on loafer with a sneaker-style sole for comfort. Leather upper with a penny loafer detail.

description: High-performance running sneaker with mesh upper, cushioned midsole, and durable rubber outsole. Lightweight at 280g.

name: Men's Classic White Sneaker
description: Timeless all-white leather sneaker with a low profile, clean toe box, and a vulcanised rubber sole.

name: Men's Oxford Shoes
description: Full-brogue Oxford in polished leather with leather sole and heel. A classic of formal footwear.

name: Men's Chelsea Boots

description: Pure silk festive kurta with boat neckline and hand-embroidered neckline detailing. A premium ethnic piece.

description: Long flared Anarkali kurta with thread and mirror embroidery on the yoke. Pairs with churidar and dupatta.

description: Vibrant ikat-print palazzo set with a tunic-length kurta and matching wide-leg palazzo pants. A festive-casual staple.

description: Compact crossbody bag with a flap closure, chain strap, and a small interior pocket. Perfect for evenings and travel.

name: Canvas Weekender Bag

description: Slouchy drawstring bucket bag in soft suede with a leather trim and a removable interior pouch.

description: Classic quilted flap bag with gold-tone hardware, a chain shoulder strap, and a turn-lock closure. Timeless and sophisticated.

description: Handwoven straw raffia tote with leather handles and a contrast lining. Perfect for beach days and summer outings.

description: Sleek zip-top clutch in smooth leather with a card slot and wrist strap. Doubles as a wallet.

description: Delicate three-layer necklace with a star, moon, and heart pendant. Dainty and perfect for everyday layering.

name: Hoop Earrings — Gold

name: Statement Drop Earrings
description: Dramatic drop earrings with resin or stone embellishment. A single statement piece that transforms a simple look.

name: Stackable Ring Set

name: Pearl Stud Earrings

description: Natural stone beaded stretch bracelet with semi-precious stones. Each stone has unique markings.

name: Women's Leather Belt

name: Woven Raffia Belt
description: Braided raffia belt with a gold hook-and-eye closure. Adds texture and a summer bohemian vibe.

description: Chic oversized square-frame sunglasses with UV400 protection and thick acetate frames. An instant style upgrade.

name: Aviator Sunglasses
description: Classic tear-drop aviator with thin metal wire frames and polarised mirrored lenses. Unisex and timeless.

name: Baseball Cap

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Woven straw wide-brim hat with a grosgrain ribbon trim. UPF 50+ sun protection, packable for travel.

name: Beanie Hat
description: Soft ribbed knit beanie in a relaxed slouch fit. Merino wool blend keeps you warm and itch-free.

name: Silk Hair Scrunchie Set

name: Pearl Hair Clips Set
description: Set of 4 faux pearl-embellished claw clips and snap clips in assorted sizes. Elegant and trendy.

name: Scarf — Silk Square
description: Vintage-inspired silk square scarf with a bold print. Wear it in your hair, around your neck, or on your bag.

description: Luxe cashmere-blend winter scarf in a generous 60×200cm size. Plaid check pattern with fringe ends.

name: Wristwatch — Minimalist
description: Sleek minimalist watch with a clean white dial, rose gold case, and a genuine leather strap. Japanese quartz movement.

description: Sleek sports watch with a 40mm stainless steel case, silicone strap, and 100m water resistance. Chronograph functionality.

name: Women's Block Heel Sandals
description: Strappy block-heel sandals with an ankle strap and adjustable buckle. 6cm heel height for comfortable elevation.

name: Women's Stiletto Pumps
description: Classic pointed-toe stiletto pumps in patent or nappa leather. 10cm heel. An evening wardrobe essential.

name: Women's Platform Heels
description: Chunky platform heels with a square toe, ankle strap, and a thick sole that makes 8cm feel like nothing.

name: Women's Kitten Heel Mules
description: Understated kitten heel mule in soft suede with an open back and a pointed toe. Elegant and wearable.

name: Women's Ballet Flats
description: Genuine leather ballet flats with a rounded toe, elastic vamp, and a cushioned footbed. A wardrobe classic.

name: Women's Loafers
description: Chunky-sole penny loafer in smooth leather with a low stacked heel. Smart casual and effortlessly classic.

name: Strappy Flat Sandals
description: Minimalist strappy flat sandals with thin leather straps and a flexible rubber outsole. Easy summer wear.

name: Women's Canvas Sneakers
description: Low-top canvas sneakers with a vulcanised rubber sole and metal eyelet lacing. Casual and fun.

name: Women's Platform Sneakers
description: Chunky platform sneakers with a thick moulded sole and leather upper. Add height without the heel pain.

name: Women's Running Trainers
description: Engineered mesh running shoe with foam cushioning, a breathable upper, and durable rubber outsole. Lightweight at 220g.

name: Chelsea Ankle Boots — Women
description: Sleek leather Chelsea ankle boots with elastic side gussets and a stacked heel. Versatile for any season.

name: Knee-High Boots
description: Smooth leather knee-high boots with a 5cm block heel and a side zip. Elevated and elegant for autumn-winter.

name: Cowboy Western Boots
description: Fashion cowboy boots with an embossed leather upper, pointed toe, and stacked wooden heel. A statement footwear piece.

name: Slip-On Mule Sneakers
description: Backless slip-on trainers with a knit upper, cushioned footbed, and a flexible rubber sole. Effortless everyday footwear.

name: Espadrille Wedges
description: Canvas espadrille wedges with an ankle-wrap tie and a jute-wrapped wedge heel. A summer classic.

name: Thong Flip Flops
description: Simple rubber thong flip flops with a contoured footbed. Waterproof and comfortable for beach and pool.

name: Embellished Kolhapuri Sandals
description: Traditional handcrafted Kolhapuri sandals in genuine leather with bead and mirror embellishments. Artisan-made.

name: Juttis — Embroidered
description: Traditional Punjabi juttis with intricate thread and sequin embroidery on a cushioned leather sole. Ideal for ethnic outfits.

name: Mesh Tote Bag — Beach
description: Oversized open-weave mesh tote with a zip pouch insert. Perfect for the beach — sandy items fall through easily.

name: Zodiac Pendant Necklace
description: Dainty gold-filled zodiac constellation pendant on a delicate chain. Personalised and meaningful gifting option.

name: Ear Cuff Set
description: Set of 3 gold or silver ear cuffs in mixed shapes — spiral, leaf, and bar. No piercing required.

name: Gold Bangle Set
description: Set of 4 slim gold-plated bangles in mixed textures — smooth, hammered, twisted, and beaded.

name: Oxidised Silver Jhumkas
description: Traditional oxidised silver jhumka earrings with intricate filigree work and a hook closure.

name: Chunky Resin Bracelet
description: Bold resin cuff bracelet with swirled marble-effect pattern. A statement piece that pairs with minimal outfits.

name: Ankle Bracelet — Gold Chain
description: Delicate gold chain anklet with a charm detail and a lobster clasp. Adjustable length 9–11 inches.

name: Waist Belt Bag — Leather
description: Sleek leather hip bag with a single zip compartment and a velcro-secured adjustable belt. Minimalist and functional.

name: Woven Shoulder Bag
description: Hand-woven rattan and leather shoulder bag with a bamboo handle and a fabric inner lining.

name: Leather Card Holder
description: Compact slim card holder in full-grain leather with 6 card slots and a central cash compartment.

name: Zip-Around Wallet
description: Zip-around leather wallet with 12 card slots, a coin compartment, and a note section. Organise everything in one place.

name: Embroidered Potli Bag
description: Traditional Indian potli drawstring bag with zardozi embroidery and a golden cord. Pairs beautifully with ethnic outfits.

name: Women's Ankle Strap Flats
description: Pointed-toe flats with a delicate ankle strap and a metallic buckle. A polished everyday flat.

name: Women's Wedge Boots
description: Suede ankle boots with a concealed wedge heel and a side zip. Comfortable height with a sleek silhouette.

name: T-Bar Mary Jane Shoes
description: Retro T-bar Mary Jane with a medium block heel and a round toe. A fashion-forward classic.

name: Sneaker Wedge
description: Hidden wedge sneaker with a knit upper, lace-up front, and a 6cm concealed wedge sole. Sporty and stylish.

name: Mules with Bow Detail
description: Grosgrain ribbon bow mule with a flat sole and a square toe. A cute and feminine everyday flat.

name: Tie-Dye Silk Scrunchies
description: Pack of 3 hand-dyed silk scrunchies in tie-dye patterns. Effortlessly cool and gentle on hair.

name: Crystal Hair Pins Set
description: Set of 6 crystal rhinestone bobby pins in gold or silver settings. Embellish updos and braids with a sprinkle of sparkle.

name: Printed Silk Bandana
description: Compact 55×55cm printed silk bandana. Style it as a headband, neck tie, wrist wrap, or bag accessory.

name: Fanny Pack — Nylon
description: Lightweight nylon fanny pack with a main compartment, front zip pocket, and adjustable waist strap. Functional and sporty.
